TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Towic ato Aramoringit a selal == Mipatay ko Tafalong a tamdaw to Piyuma a tamdaw太巴塱人殺害卑南人 Itiya ho mipatay to Piyuma ko Tafalong a tamdw, ci Tangatang ko ngangan noya mipatayan no Tafalong. O Piyuma sato "patodong kita to nipatayan no Tafalong, miala (mipatay) kita to Tafalong " sato koya Piyuma, o Kiwit sato a tamdaw pa'ading to Tafalong, orasaka, misatalo'an i cepo' no Alangahay maherek a misatalo'an toya to a romi'ad. Ocooren no kaka a selal o Towic ato Aramoringit selal,ko kakeridan no sasafaay selal na Towic ato Aramoringit, ci Odoy Kering aci Fayo Niwac a selal, "katayra i inorong ato dimata' a misolap" han ni Towic ato Aramoringit ca Odoy Kering ato Fayo Niwac. Ci Odoy Kering aci Fayo Niwac so'elinay satalomilom sato a ma'araw ko kaitiraan no Pyuma. Cikay sato a minokay tayra i makakaay a selal a pasifana'. " iraay han＂han to no Towic ato Aramoringit, "iraay to mama" han to safa a selal ko sowal.. == Pacefaday a tilid 註解 ==
S.PHON: == to~uwiʦ ato~u aramo~uriŋit a səɾaɾ == mipataj ko~u tafaɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u pijo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw********* itija ħo~u mipataj to~u pijo~u~uma ko~u tafaɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮw, ʦi taŋataŋ ko~u ŋaŋan no~uja mipatajan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ. o~u pijo~u~uma sato~u "pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kita to~u nipatajan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ, miaɾa (mipataj) kita to~u tafaɾo~uŋ " sato~u ko~uja pijo~u~uma, o~u kiwit sato~u a tamɬ~ɮaw paʡaɬ~ɮiŋ to~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~urasaka, misataɾo~uʡan i ʦəpo~uʡ no~u aɾaŋaħaj maħərək a misataɾo~uʡan to~uja to~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~uʦo~uo~urən no~u kaka a səɾaɾ o~u to~uwiʦ ato~u aramo~uriŋit səɾaɾ,ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u sasafaaj səɾaɾ na to~uwiʦ ato~u aramo~uriŋit, ʦi o~uɬ~ɮo~uj kəriŋ aʦi fajo~u niwaʦ a səɾaɾ, "katajra i ino~uro~uŋ ato~u ɬ~ɮimataʡ a miso~uɾap" ħan ni to~uwiʦ ato~u aramo~uriŋit ʦa o~uɬ~ɮo~uj kəriŋ ato~u fajo~u niwaʦ. ʦi o~uɬ~ɮo~uj kəriŋ aʦi fajo~u niwaʦ so~uʡəɾinaj sataɾo~umiɾo~um sato~u a maʡaraw ko~u kaitiraan no~u pjo~u~uma. ʦikaj sato~u a mino~ukaj tajra i makakaaj a səɾaɾ a pasifanaʡ. " iraaj ħan*ħan to~u no~u to~uwiʦ ato~u aramo~uriŋit, "iraaj to~u mama" ħan to~u safa a səɾaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ.. == paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ** ==
S.FORM: == Towic ato Aramoringit a selal == Mipatay ko Tafalong a tamdaw to Piyuma a tamdaw太巴塱人殺害卑南人 Itiya ho mipatay to Piyuma ko Tafalong a tamdw, ci Tangatang ko ngangan noya mipatayan no Tafalong. O Piyuma sato "patodong kita to nipatayan no Tafalong, miala (mipatay) kita to Tafalong " sato koya Piyuma, o Kiwit sato a tamdaw pa'ading to Tafalong, orasaka, misatalo'an i cepo' no Alangahay maherek a misatalo'an toya to a romi'ad. Ocooren no kaka a selal o Towic ato Aramoringit selal,ko kakeridan no sasafaay selal na Towic ato Aramoringit, ci Odoy Kering aci Fayo Niwac a selal, "katayra i inorong ato dimata' a misolap" han ni Towic ato Aramoringit ca Odoy Kering ato Fayo Niwac. Ci Odoy Kering aci Fayo Niwac so'elinay satalomilom sato a ma'araw ko kaitiraan no Pyuma. Cikay sato a minokay tayra i makakaay a selal a pasifana'. " iraay han＂han to no Towic ato Aramoringit, "iraay to mama" han to safa a selal ko sowal.. == Pacefaday a tilid 註解 ==
S.PHON: == to~uwiʦ ato~u aramo~uriŋit a səɾaɾ == mipataj ko~u tafaɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u pijo~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw********* itija ħo~u mipataj to~u pijo~u~uma ko~u tafaɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮw, ʦi taŋataŋ ko~u ŋaŋan no~uja mipatajan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ. o~u pijo~u~uma sato~u "pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kita to~u nipatajan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ, miaɾa (mipataj) kita to~u tafaɾo~uŋ " sato~u ko~uja pijo~u~uma, o~u kiwit sato~u a tamɬ~ɮaw paʡaɬ~ɮiŋ to~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~urasaka, misataɾo~uʡan i ʦəpo~uʡ no~u aɾaŋaħaj maħərək a misataɾo~uʡan to~uja to~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~uʦo~uo~urən no~u kaka a səɾaɾ o~u to~uwiʦ ato~u aramo~uriŋit səɾaɾ,ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u sasafaaj səɾaɾ na to~uwiʦ ato~u aramo~uriŋit, ʦi o~uɬ~ɮo~uj kəriŋ aʦi fajo~u niwaʦ a səɾaɾ, "katajra i ino~uro~uŋ ato~u ɬ~ɮimataʡ a miso~uɾap" ħan ni to~uwiʦ ato~u aramo~uriŋit ʦa o~uɬ~ɮo~uj kəriŋ ato~u fajo~u niwaʦ. ʦi o~uɬ~ɮo~uj kəriŋ aʦi fajo~u niwaʦ so~uʡəɾinaj sataɾo~umiɾo~um sato~u a maʡaraw ko~u kaitiraan no~u pjo~u~uma. ʦikaj sato~u a mino~ukaj tajra i makakaaj a səɾaɾ a pasifanaʡ. " iraaj ħan*ħan to~u no~u to~uwiʦ ato~u aramo~uriŋit, "iraaj to~u mama" ħan to~u safa a səɾaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ.. == paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ** ==
